description:
Enable/disable object as a feature/landmark. Possible feature types: * 0 - Feature disabled * 1 - Object is always visible within object view distance * 2 - Object is always visible within terrain view distance {{Feature|important| The limit is '''500''' map/static objects and '''200''' dynamic objects including config features and auto features (flying helicopters, airplanes).
The command returns [[false]] if the related limit is reached. }}
examples:
Set a building to be always rendered:
<sqf>building setFeatureType 2;</sqf>
name: setFeatureType

ret.desc: [[true]] if the feature is set, [[false]] otherwise (limit reached)
